title: Man Of Faith
description: Totem of Undying reskinned as a Cross
body:
**[Includes labPBR support]**

This resource pack replaces the default Totem of Undying with a beautifully crafted cross design, giving it a unique, spiritual aesthetic. 

Perfect for players who want their Minecraft adventures to have a symbolic touch!

![1st Person In Hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9006052123608276630b597ac81796eb9c42764d.jpeg)

![3rd Peron In Hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da12262491b2c189ee32d9aaa4fb199dd08d130d.jpeg)
